title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 18th February 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.detail: Result came flat but top line is holding above Rs 1,000 cr and the smart-meter business is continuing, so no need to fear. Don't average right now; wait for annual results and stabilization. Don't sell.

Labelled as a defence stock; after correction to nearly Rs 2,400 (from ~3,700) it looks attractive. Results stable, order book good, Government of India focus increasing. Hold; don't average immediately.
Consistent weakness with a fall of more than 50% in recent times, but valuation is present at current levels. Hold; don't average immediately.
Consistent weakness recently, but valuation present at current levels. Hold; don't average immediately.

recommendations.note: Hold; becoming attractive at current levels
recommendations.detail: Results are all good. Like other PSU shipyards many bought the 2024 peak and got stuck; touching old highs will take time. Becoming attractive to buy around 2,400-2,500. Don't sell, hold.

Surprisingly weak result with flattish commentary derailed the turnaround thesis; fell from ~870-880 to ~650-660, near the 52-week low. Belongs to the good Dhanuka group so hold with patience for now, but exit on any small rally, closer to 210-220.

Dec-quarter top line jumped but margins are disappointing; cash-rich and many await an acquisition that could take it back to 700-800 levels, but if cash exhausts without one there is downside risk. They paid Rs 12 cr interest (took a loan) which must be watched. Hold; watch one more quarter; SaaS model faces possible AI disruption.
Buy without any doubt; accumulate on every decline. Post the REC merger this becomes one very big entity. Definitely a good buy at current levels.

IPO-euphoria encashment; a ~Rs 7,000-8,000 cr market cap is not justified for a fashion-jewellery company of this size. Already at its 52-week low and could halve from here. It is now a large-player game (Aditya Birla's Indriya). Exit on rallies.

Good branding but flat and not growing, turnover stagnant for long; same risk as BlueStone applies. Watch whether the company restructures and kick-starts the business with new brands; otherwise it is a good takeover target. Exit on rallies.

An extremely speculative counter, frequently in the ban list; swings to 175-180 then easily back to 135-140. Treat only as a speculative bet. At ~145-148 it can prepare a short-term rally and may attempt 160-180 again.

recommendations.note: Buy only for dividend; limited upside
recommendations.detail: Value is present but the stock is already near its peak (~194, ~14 PE) with limited appreciation ahead; may attempt 210-215. Dividend is only ~2.1% yield, so buy only for dividend. Could rotate out into better performers on a rally.

recommendations.note: Wait one more quarter for fresh buying
recommendations.detail: Corrected to ~3,300-3,400 after a brokerage report, recovered and now sustains at ~4,000; last quarter was flat. Would wait for another quarter of performance before fresh buying.
Already corrected from 18,000 to ~10,000 and stabilizing at ~11,650. One of the largest third-party electronics manufacturers. Definitely a buy; for the medium term it looks good at current levels.

HUL-demerged ice-cream entity, double down-circuit; market questions the ~Rs 6,000 cr market cap for an ice-cream company. Buyable closer to 22-23 levels, in March, with the summer season approaching.

A good company; hype has gone and it is now at a realistic valuation (~1,800-1,900 vs a prior 3,500). Results flat but competent, with an encouraging recent earnings-call transcript. Hold; watch carefully due to low volumes/liquidity which can cause sharp moves.
